commands.repair_reason: Needs maintainer review because this changes a transcript privacy/safety default and the contributor still needs to provide real after-fix behavior proof.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a concrete privacy-sensitive default by sending raw uncompacted transcript history into fresh CLI runs.; Review finding: [P1] Keep raw reseed behind an explicit opt-in — src/agents/cli-runner/session-history.ts:200-206 (sha=0d85f821cc3fe8c10a0b75fbee99717acdcbd417)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes CLI session reseeding to return a bounded raw message tail for sessions with no compaction and updates the unit test to expect a raw-tail history prompt.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main returns no reseed messages for uncompacted sessions, and the fresh-session prompt path then has no rendered history. I did not live-run the idle-reset scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer review because this changes a transcript privacy/safety default and the contributor still needs to provide real after-fix behavior proof.
